infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Used to take photos of cars for listings.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Used to select car photos for listings.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Used to show your location on the map and tag car listings.

plugins.cameraPermission: Allow Goovoiture to access your camera.

plugins.photosPermission: Allow Goovoiture to access your photos.

plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: Allow Goovoiture to use your location.
